name: GH_CapsuleRenderEngine
summary: Provides basic Render methods for capsule display. You typically don't need this class, just use the Render() overloads on GH_Capsule directly.

methods.name: CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle rec, int radius, int size)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating Grasshopper Capsule highlight fills.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the highlight fill shape.

methods.name: CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle, Int32, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle rec, int R0, int R1, int size)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating Grasshopper Capsule highlight fills.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the highlight fill shape.

methods.name: CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle rec, int radius, int size, bool jaggedLeft, bool jaggedRight)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating Grasshopper Capsule highlight fills.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the highlight fill shape.

methods.name: CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle, Int32, Int32, Int32, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateHighlightBar(Rectangle rec, int R0, int R1, int size, bool jaggedLeft, bool jaggedRight)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating Grasshopper Capsule highlight fills.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the highlight fill shape.

methods.name: CreateJaggedRectangle
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateJaggedRectangle(RectangleF rec, float R0, float R1, float R2, float R3, bool jaggedLeft, bool jaggedRight)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating rectangles with rounded corners.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Rectangle to fillet. Rectangles smaller than 3 pixels wide/high will be grown.

params.name: R0
params.doc: Radius of upper left corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R1
params.doc: Radius of upper right corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R2
params.doc: Radius of lower right corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R3
params.doc: Radius of lower left corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: jaggedLeft
params.doc: If true, the left edge of the rectangle will be jagged and R0 and R3 will be ignored.

params.name: jaggedRight
params.doc: If true, the right edge of the rectangle will be jagged and R1 and R2 will be ignored.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the rounded rectangle.

methods.name: CreateRoundedRectangle(Rectangle, Int32)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateRoundedRectangle(Rectangle rec, int radius)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating rectangles with rounded corners.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Rectangle to fillet. Rectangles smaller than 3 pixels wide/high will be grown.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the rounded rectangle.

methods.name: CreateRoundedRectangle(RectangleF, Single)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateRoundedRectangle(RectangleF rec, float radius)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating rectangles with rounded corners.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Rectangle to fillet. Rectangles smaller than 3 pixels wide/high will be grown.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the rounded rectangle.

methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateRoundedRectangle(Rectangle rec, int R0, int R1, int R2, int R3)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating rectangles with rounded corners.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Rectangle to fillet. Rectangles smaller than 3 pixels wide/high will be grown.

params.name: R0
params.doc: Radius of upper left corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R1

params.name: R2
params.doc: Radius of lower right corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R3
params.doc: Radius of lower left corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

returns.doc: Graphics path that describes the rounded rectangle.

methods.name: CreateRoundedRectangle(RectangleF, Single, Single, Single, Single)
methods.signature: public static GraphicsPath CreateRoundedRectangle(RectangleF rec, float R0, float R1, float R2, float R3)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for creating rectangles with rounded corners.

params.name: rec
params.doc: Rectangle to fillet. Rectangles smaller than 3 pixels wide/high will be grown.

params.name: R0
params.doc: Radius of upper left corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

params.name: R1
params.doc: Radius of upper right corner. Zero or negative values omit fillets.

methods.name: GetImpliedPalette
methods.signature: public static GH_Palette GetImpliedPalette(IGH_ActiveObject obj)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for solving which palette is the default given a specific object's properties. Default palettes are either GH_Palette.Normal, GH_Palette.Warning or GH_Palette.Error depending on the objects' runtime message level.

methods.name: GetImpliedStyle(GH_Palette, IGH_Attributes)
methods.signature: public static GH_PaletteStyle GetImpliedStyle(GH_Palette palette, IGH_Attributes attributes)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for solving which palette style is implied by the properties.

params.name: attributes
params.doc: Attributes to parse for style details.

methods.name: GetImpliedStyle(GH_Palette, Boolean, Boolean, Boolean)
methods.signature: public static GH_PaletteStyle GetImpliedStyle(GH_Palette palette, bool selected, bool locked, bool hidden)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method for solving which palette style is implied by the properties.

params.name: selected
params.doc: Specifies whether the selected flavour of a palette needs to be returned.

params.name: locked
params.doc: If True, the returned palette style is always Locked.

params.name: hidden
params.doc: If True, the returned palette style is always Hidden.

methods.name: RenderAlphaFill
methods.signature: public void RenderAlphaFill(Graphics G)
methods.summary: Render a standard transparancy background hatch. This is only needed when the capsule background colour is not fully opaque. This is usually the second stage in a capsule rendering, right after the Grips are drawn.

methods.name: RenderBackground
methods.signature: public void RenderBackground(Graphics G, float zoom, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Render a default capsule background fill. This is usually the third stage in a capsule rendering.

methods.name: RenderBackground_Alternative
methods.signature: public void RenderBackground_Alternative(Graphics G, Color colourOverride, bool drawAlphaGrid)
methods.summary: Render a custom capsule background fill. This is usually the third stage in a capsule rendering.

params.name: drawAlphaGrid
params.doc: If true, and the background colour is not opaque, an alpha grid will be drawn as well.

methods.name: RenderBoundaryDots
methods.signature: public void RenderBoundaryDots(Graphics G, int count, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Render a collection of boundary dots along the top edge of the capsule.

methods.name: RenderGrips
methods.signature: public void RenderGrips(Graphics G)
methods.summary: Render all the grips associates with the capsule. Grips are not drawn if the zoom level is less than 50%. This is usually the first stage in a Capsule rendering.

methods.name: RenderGrips_Alternative
methods.signature: public void RenderGrips_Alternative(Graphics G)
methods.summary: Render all the grips associates with the capsule as semi-circles. This is needed if the capsule background is not fully opaque. Grips are not drawn if the zoom level is less than 50%. This is usually the first stage in a Capsule rendering.

methods.name: RenderHighlight
methods.signature: public void RenderHighlight(Graphics G)
methods.summary: Render a highlight bar. This is highly zoom-dependant. Highlight rendering is usually the fourth stage in a Capsule Rendering, after the background but prior to the edges.

methods.name: RenderIcon(Graphics, Image, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public void RenderIcon(Graphics G, Image icon, int offsetX = 0, int offsetY = 0)
methods.summary: Render an image icon centered into the box. If the content box has been defined the icon will be centered there, otherwise the outline box will be used.

methods.name: RenderIcon(Graphics, Image, RectangleF, Int32, Int32)
methods.signature: public void RenderIcon(Graphics G, Image icon, RectangleF box, int offsetX = 0, int offsetY = 0)
methods.summary: Render an image icon centered into the box. If the content box has been defined the icon will be centered there, otherwise the outline box will be used.

methods.name: RenderInputGrip
methods.signature: public static void RenderInputGrip(Graphics G, float zoom, PointF loc, bool full)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method to render a default input grip.

params.name: full
params.doc: If true, a complete circular grip will be draw. If false, a semi-circular grip will be drawn.

methods.name: RenderMessage
methods.signature: public Rectangle RenderMessage(Graphics G, string message, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Render a text message underneath the capsule.

methods.name: RenderOutlines
methods.signature: public void RenderOutlines(Graphics G, float zoom, GH_PaletteStyle style)
methods.summary: Render default capsule outlines. If the zoom factor is less than 50% the inner outline is not drawn. This is usually the fifth stage in a Capsule rendering.

params.name: style
params.doc: Palette style that defines edge properties.

methods.name: RenderOutputGrip
methods.signature: public static void RenderOutputGrip(Graphics G, float zoom, PointF loc, bool full)
methods.summary: Static (Shared in VB) method to render a default output grip.

params.name: full
params.doc: If true, a complete circular grip will be draw. If false, a semi-circular grip will be drawn.

methods.name: RenderText
methods.signature: public void RenderText(Graphics G, Color colour)
methods.summary: Render the capsule text. This is usually the sixth and final stage in a capsule rendering.
